title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-15
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the plants, updating the daily app metrics and greenhouse stats.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse listings in the repository.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and greenhouse statistics up to date with the latest health and usage data.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee (Polly) and the robot companion checking on a digital greenhouse. The robot is holding a clipboard with metrics, while Polly waters some code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a tiny clipboard with charts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
